overview: Buildify is a construction-themed website with a fully responsive admin dashboard. Admins can manage portfolio projects, team members, services, and contact submissions — all backed by real canister data — with a clean, mobile-optimized layout across every device.
features: Admin dashboard with real-time project, team, services, and submission stats
Fully responsive admin layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Portfolio project management with CRUD and category filtering
Team member management with photo upload and display order
Contact submissions inbox with read/unread status and CSV export
Mobile-optimized tables with stacked card views
Responsive modals and forms with touch-friendly controls
